scripts.directcall:only: node -r dotenv/config -e "const express=require('express'); const env=require('./src/config/env'); const { buildDirectCallRouter }=require('./src/directcall/router'); const app=express(); app.use(express.json({limit:'1mb'})); app.use('/calls', buildDirectCallRouter()); app.listen(env.PORT, ()=>console.log('Direct-call only en puerto '+env.PORT));"
